summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Corgi U.S. Equities 10% Structured Buffer ETF (MAYC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund is an actively managed ETF, using FLEX options to provide the price return of SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust to a cap while providing a buffer against the first 10% decline on an annual basis. This series begins on May 1 of each year
